title: Client Kits+
description: A modern, client-side inventory kit manager that lets you save and load custom kits across worlds and servers, updated for newer Minecraft versions.
body:
# Save and reuse your custom kits!

Client Kits+ is an updated continuation of the original Client Kits mod, rebuilt to support newer Minecraft releases. It allows you to save your current inventory as named kits and load them later across singleplayer worlds and multiplayer servers.

## How to Use

After installing the mod, the following commands will be available in-game:

**/ck save <name>**
Stores your current inventory as a kit with the given name.

**/ck load <name>**
Applies the selected kit to your inventory.

**/ck delete <name>**
Permanently removes the specified kit.

**/ck preview <name>**
Opens a preview inventory to view the contents of a saved kit before loading it.

## Important Information

- Loading kits requires creative mode access, whether in singleplayer or multiplayer. Saving, previewing, and deleting kits can be done in any game mode.
- All kits are saved locally in the mod’s config directory, making them easy to back up or share.
- Once a kit is deleted, it cannot be recovered unless a backup exists.

## Credits

This mod is an updated continuation of Client Kits, originally created by its original author and licensed under the MIT License.
